failedAssertions.reason: Resume Autopilot button is visible but clicking it does not successfully resume autopilot. Autopilot appears stuck in paused state. The pause reason may still be active (budget cap or other) preventing resume. REGRESSION: Previously 'blocked' (round 3) now 'failed' - button is interactable but resume action does not succeed.

E2E product loop broken at idea->delivery-work step. Swiping an idea YES marks it as approved and shows 'Swiped yes — Idea now approved' message, but NO delivery run is created. Delivery Runs section persists showing 'No delivery runs yet.' The idea->planning->delivery flow is not wired up correctly.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Add Idea button stays disabled even after filling title and description fields. Cannot create ideas to trigger planning flow.
Cannot create delivery runs without VAL-AUTOPILOT-030 (idea creation)
No delivery runs exist to test workspace/port metadata
Budget controls disabled; autopilot stuck in paused state preventing budget cap testing
No delivery runs exist to test convoy blocking
No delivery runs exist to test checkpoint/resume
No delivery runs exist to test merge coordination
No active delivery runs exist for operator intervention testing
No completed runs to generate learner summaries; Knowledge section not visible in UI
No digest section visible in UI; digests not triggered
No release-health section visible in UI; no merged runs with health failures

systemicBlockers.description: Cannot create ideas - Add Idea button remains disabled. This is the root cause blocking VAL-AUTOPILOT-030. Without ideas, no swipe review can occur, no delivery runs can be created, and all downstream assertions (035-041, 031, 032) remain blocked.
systemicBlockers.rootCause: Add Idea button UI state does not enable when title/description fields are filled. Could be: (1) Form validation not triggering state change, (2) Submit handler not wired to button, (3) API call failing silently

systemicBlockers.description: Autopilot stuck in paused state with non-functional Resume button. This blocks VAL-AUTOPILOT-034 testing and prevents autopilot from running at all, compounding the idea creation issue.
systemicBlockers.rootCause: Resume button click does not change autopilot state. May indicate: (1) API call failing, (2) pause reason still active, (3) state not persisting

systemicBlockers.description: E2E flow broken at idea->delivery-work step. Even when existing ideas are approved via swipe, no delivery run is created. VAL-CROSS-001 fails.
systemicBlockers.rootCause: Swipe YES marks idea as approved but createDeliveryRun or equivalent is not triggered or not working

systemicBlockers.description: Missing UI sections for Knowledge (039), Digests (040), and Release Health (041). These may not be implemented yet or not visible in current UI.
systemicBlockers.rootCause: These sections may require implementation or may only appear after certain conditions (completed runs, triggered digests, release failures)

regressionsFromRound3.description: Button is now interactable but resume action does not succeed. Previously not tested end-to-end.

frictions.description: Add Idea button remains disabled even after filling in title and description fields
Autopilot stuck in paused state - Resume button non-functional
Console shows many Unauthenticated OIDC token errors and response.clone errors
Idea->delivery-work flow broken: swipe YES creates approved idea but no delivery run

progressFromPriorRounds: Round 3 identified VAL-AUTOPILOT-030 as critical path blocker and VAL-AUTOPILOT-033 (budget pause visibility) as UI issue. After commits 51683c04 (idea->swipe->planning) and 943d2112 (pause badge visibility), round 4 testing reveals: (1) VAL-AUTOPILOT-030 still blocked - Add Idea button disabled, (2) VAL-AUTOPILOT-034 regressed to 'failed' - Resume button non-functional, (3) VAL-CROSS-001 failed - E2E flow broken at idea->delivery-work, (4) VAL-AUTOPILOT-039/040/041 have missing UI sections. Overall status: no improvement, 2 regressions.
